chunks.text: Abstract Models for the Synthesis of Optimization Algorithms (M268) by G. Meyer and E. Polak. Optimization of Nonlinear Characteristics (M267) by M.K. Inan and C.A. Desoer. Representing Martingales as Stochastic Integrals (M266) by Eugene Wong. A Computer Program For Simulation of Tapered Dispersionless Lossy Transmission Lines (M265) by S.R.P. Teixeirs and R.A. Rohrer.

Design of Linear Time-Varying and Nonlinear Time-Invariant Networks (M264) by Charles A. Desoer and Behrouz Peikari. A Decomposition Algorithm for Solving a Class of Optimal Control Problems (M263) by G. Meyer and E. Polak. Input-Output Properties of Multiple-Input Multiple-Output Discrete Systems: Part II (M262) by M.Y. Wu and C.A. Desoer.

Computational Methods in Discrete Optimal Control and Nonlinear Programming: A Unified Approach (M261) by E. Polak. The 'Frozen Operating Point' Method of Small Signal Analysis (M260) by C.A. Desoer and B. Peikari. Input-Output Properties of Multiple-Input Multiple-Output Discrete Systems: Part I (M259) by C.A. Desoer and M.Y. Wu.
Investigation of a Sheet Model for a Bounded Plasma with Magnetic Field and Radiation (M257) by A.B. Langdon and J.M. Dawson.
